videos.headline: Mark Gronowski takes the QB keeper 51 yards to the house
videos.description: Mark Gronowski keeps it himself and outruns the Bison's defense for a 51-yard Jackrabbits touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Mark Gronowski takes the QB keeper 51 yards to the house) 2023/01/08 ESHEET

videos.headline: Isaiah Davis breaks free for a South Dakota State TD
videos.description: Isaiah Davis breaks free and finds pay dirt to put the Jackrabbits on the board.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Isaiah Davis breaks free for a South Dakota TD) 2023/01/08 ESHEET

videos.headline: Cam Miller finds Joe Stoffel in stride for a North Dakota State TD
videos.description: Joe Stoffell hauls in the dime from Cam Miller to put the Bison on the board.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cam Miller finds Joe Stoffel in stride for a North Dakota TD) 2023/01/08 ESHEET

videos.headline: Amar Johnson turns on the jets and finds the end zone for South Dakota State
videos.description: Amar Johnson turns on the burners and outruns the Bison's defense to reclaim the lead for the Jackrabbits.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Amar Johnson turns on the burners and finds the end zone for South Dakota) 2023/01/08 ESHEET

videos.headline: Dalys Beanum recovers the fumble for South Dakota State
videos.description: Adam Bock jars the ball free and Dalys Beanum recovers it for the Jackrabbits.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dalys Beanum recovers the fumble for South Dakota) 2023/01/08 ESHEET

videos.headline: Mark Gronowski finds a wide-open Jaxon Janke to extend South Dakota State's lead
videos.description: Jaxon Janke hauls in the dime from Mark Gronowski to give the Jackrabbits a 21-7 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Mark Gronowski finds a wide-open Jaxon Janke to extend South Dakota's lead) 2023/01/08 ESHEET

videos.headline: Michael Morgan walks into the end zone untouched for South Dakota State
videos.description: Michael Morgan makes the grab and outruns the Bison's defense for a 44-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Michael Morgan walks into the end zone untouched for South Dakota State) 2023/01/08 ESHEET

videos.headline: Cam Miller launches a beauty to Eli Green for a North Dakota State TD
videos.description: Cam Miller lets it fly and finds Eli Green for a 44-yard Bison touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cam Miller launches a beauty to Eli Green for a North Dakota State TD) 2023/01/08 ESHEET

videos.headline: North Dakota State's offense pushes Kobe Johnson into the end zone
videos.description: Kobe Johnson keeps his feet pumping and is pushed across the goal line to pull the Bison closer.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (North Dakota State's offense pushes Kobe Johnson into the end zone) 2023/01/08 ESHEET

videos.headline: Mark Gronowski airs it out to Jaxon Janke for a South Dakota State TD
videos.description: Mark Gronowski lets it fly and finds Jaxon Janke to give the Jackrabbits a 45-21 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Mark Gronowski airs it out to Jaxon Janke for a South Dakota State TD) 2023/01/08 ESHEET

videos.headline: South Dakota State's defense comes away with their 2nd INT of the 2nd-half
videos.description: DyShawn Gales elevates and hauls in the Jackrabbits' second interception of the second half.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (South Dakota State's defense comes away with their 2nd INT of the 2nd-half) 2023/01/08 ESHEET
